title: nilgirianthus lupulinus
intro: Nilgirianthus lupulinus, a flowering plant of the family Melastomataceae, is native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Nilgirianthus lupulinus include its potential in managing fever, pain relief, and wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Nilgirianthus lupulinus are typically made by decocting or infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in water or oil, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or topical ointments.
